top_signals.title: Escalating Middle East war could slash global growth to 1.3% in 2026, World Bank chief economist says - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Escalating Middle East war could slash global growth to 1.3% in 2026, World Bank chief economist says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Moonshot AI accessed Nvidia's chips despite Chinese export ban, White House official says
top_signals.summary: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kazakhstan approves strategic crypto mining rules tied to national reserve
top_signals.summary: Kazakhstan plans to require miners to meet strict infrastructure standards and transfer part of their mined crypto assets to a state-backed reserve under new rules.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Comcast earnings highlight NBCUniversal strength ahead of planned split
top_signals.summary: Comcast said earlier this year it would split the cable businesses from the media business, creating two separate publicly traded companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: American Airlines slashes 2026 earnings outlook as fuel costs spike
top_signals.summary: American Airlines further cut its 2026 earnings outlook, citing higher fuel costs/
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Businesses are not cash machines’ – Badenoch calls on Burnham to rule out tax rises
top_signals.summary: Kemi Badenoch has called on Andy Burnham to rule out tax rises as the new Prime Minister has made a series of small unfunded promises.  The Tory leader said Burnham seemed “like a nice guy” and had a “sense of humour” yet she ridiculed the Prime Minister’s early flurry of policies.  In her speech overlooking [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
